canonicalCoreBundle.rationale: Corrected to the fixture-local canonical measurement after Task 8 P1 review; replaces the initial root-resolved value from implementing commit ef275fe88501faff107c973144370b2b2e886bcc.

canonicalRelativeTimeBundle.rationale: Corrected to the fixture-local canonical measurement after Task 8 P1 review; replaces the initial root-resolved value from implementing commit ef275fe88501faff107c973144370b2b2e886bcc.

history.cause: Fixture-local esbuild resolution now aliases the exact-pinned Temporal polyfill instead of following the atemporal file symlink to the root dependency.
